/usr/bin/ar qc libNeoVMCodeGen.a CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMTargetMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMInstrInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMInstructionSelector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMRegisterInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMFrameLowering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMAsmPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMISelLowering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMStackify.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMMetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMNEF.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMSyscalls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/MCTargetDesc/NeoVMMCTargetDesc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/MCTargetDesc/NeoVMAsmInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMTargetObjectFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMSubtarget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NeoVMCodeGen.dir/NeoVMTargetInfo.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libNeoVMCodeGen.a
